Xue Zhou и–ӣе·һ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Zhou (и–ӣе·һ). A pirate leader, he surrendered due to Chen DengвҖҷs good governing. Xue Zhou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
